item.title: artifacts/release-2026-04-ship-notes/brief
item.description:
# release-2026-04-ship-notes
## Summary - - Shared Pages runtime and reference first-visit corpus data are now live across the fleet. - # Release Radio Demo Brief
- GitHub-native intake replaced browser token upload flows. - - Bonfyre keeps release summarization, narration, rendering, and feed emission in one small pipeline. - - The orchestration layer now shows its deterministic floor versus layered outputs directly in the app.
## Action Items - No action items detected
## Deep Summary - Key Details - - Shared Pages runtime and reference first-visit corpus data are now live across the fleet. - # Release Radio Demo Brief
- GitHub-native intake replaced browser token upload flows. - - Bonfyre keeps release summarization, narration, rendering, and feed emission in one small pipeline. - - The orchestration layer now shows its deterministic floor versus layered outputs directly in the app.
## Transcript # Release Radio Demo Brief
- GitHub-native intake replaced browser token upload flows. - Shared Pages runtime and reference first-visit corpus data are now live across the fleet. - Bonfyre keeps release summarization, narration, rendering, and feed emission in one small pipeline. - The orchestration layer now shows its deterministic floor versus layered outputs directly in the app.
